case_title: ATKINS, WALTER vs. CARPENTER, ELLA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATKINS, WALTER SERVED MAR-14-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARPENTER, ELLA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $100.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATKINS, WALTER AS TO DEFENDANT CARPENTER, ELLA

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CARPENTER, ELLA
